title: coryphopteris pectiniformis
intro: Coryphopteris pectiniformis, also known as the Pectin-Leaf Coryphopteris, is a species of fern native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The leaves of the Coryphopteris pectiniformis plant are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and antipyretic properties. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion to be consumed as a herbal remedy.
